calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-05-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT PHALLA SARS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. 3 DAY NOTICE IS FATALLY DEFECTIVE BECAUSE IT TELLS A RESIDENTIAL TENANT INCORRECTLY THAT FAILURE TO PAY 16-MONTHS OF RENT WITHIN 3 DAYS WILL LEAD TO EVICTION. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. (301/PJB/PM) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
